programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper
programme.sub-title: The Wind Beneath My Nose Bumps
programme.desc: Elaine calls the growth on her love handle her third breast; Jessica's cyst is close to her eye and could be dangerous for Dr. Lee to remove; Dwayne wants his nose bumps removed, but he may not be able to make it through the pain of the procedure.

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper
programme.desc: Steven's bump is so large, his daughter thinks he is growing a monster on his back; Catherine's arm lump has grown so big that it's nearly up to her armpit; Ethan suffers from an irritating rash in an uncomfortable and awkward place on his body.

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper
programme.desc: Casey's birthmark covers most of her face, head and neck; James has mysterious massive growths on his inner thigh and lower abdomen; Jerry had to hang up his rock star vocal cords when a lump grew out the side of his throat.

programme.sub-title: Hot Glue Eater, Cardboard Consumption, Breastfeeding

programme.title: My Strange Addiction
programme.sub-title: Snorting Cleaner, Chomping Cat Food, Eating Butter
programme.desc: Abigail has been eating wet cat food every day for 20 years; Tierra snorts powdered cleaning products in secret, facing life-threatening risks if she continues; James' entire diet is made up of almost nothing but butter.

programme.title: One Day in My Body
programme.desc: At just 18 years old, Loren was involved in a catastrophic forklift accident; to save his life, doctors cut him in half; Sofia was an active 29-year-old when her heart went into end-stage failure; now she must be plugged-in to stay alive.

programme.title: The Bad Foot Clinic
programme.desc: Sharon's smelly feet make her and her husband's lives a misery; however, strange smells, verrucae and hooked toes are all in a day's work for Marion.
